name: patient-summary-panel
title: Patient Summary Panel
description: The at-a-glance patient snapshot — a flush PatientBanner over condensed vitals, problems, and medications sections. Composes PatientBanner + VitalsCard + ProblemListItem + PrescriptionCard.

props.name: patient
props.description: Identity + allergies + tags + actions for the banner.

clinicalNotes: This is the clinician's first five-second read, so it is deliberately a curated snapshot, not the whole chart — pass the top few vitals/problems/meds and link out to the full record (the B-1 Patient Chart block). Allergies ride in the PatientBanner, which keeps the single most safety-critical fact pinned at the top with the patient's identity. Every embedded atom keeps its own semantics (status colors, tooltips, reference ranges), so the summary never dumbs the data down.
notes: Layer-M2 flagship panel. Client component. The centerpiece of the Patient Chart block (B-1).
